title: Daggers and purpur
description: Just a little mod I made on my free time
body: This mod has daggers of all rarity, (wood, stone, iron, gold, diamond, netherite, the new purpur) which have high attack speed and low damage, it includes a new armor set and ore called the purpur set. The mod also included a new ore and purpur nuggets, and purpur ingots. The Upgrade template for the purpur armor can be found in end city treasure. To make the armor or purpur dagger you must combine a purpur ingot with any netherite set or netherite dagger. To get the purpur ingots you must mine 9 purpur ore found in the end and smelt them into nuggets then craft them like iron nuggets into an ingot.
